summary: Iteration 22 — Tested AdSense + sponsor ads system and Sofascore-style WC 2026 hub. 19/19 backend pytest tests pass (ads config/serve/CRUD/counters, adsense-slots CRUD, WC enrichment, WC news CRUD, ads.txt). Frontend /worldcup renders all 5 sections (group-strip, hero, matches-pane, middle-pane, news-pane) with countdown, edition selector 2026→1966, stage progress bar, real flags + real fixtures (Mexico/Canada/South Africa/Korea Republic), By date/round/group toggles all functional, Standings tab with P/W/D/L/GF/GA/PTS + Group A→L switcher. Admin Ads tab exposes all expected data-testids (admin-ads, adsense-status with ca-pub-7276060210938369 visible, adsense-placement/slot/save, ads-form, ads-table). AdSlot auto-ads markers render on /, /wallet and /worldcup. Mobile sticky bottom slot present on 390px viewport. No CRA compile overlay on any tested route. /ads.txt served correctly.

minor.issue: Team-name → group lookup misses some teams (e.g. 'Korea Republic' returned group=null while 'South Africa' resolves). Likely a stored-spelling mismatch between wc2026_groups.teams and matches.home/away_team_name. Affects 'By group' grouping accuracy in the FE.

action_items: (Minor) Reconcile team-name strings between wc2026_groups.teams and matches.home/away_team_name (e.g. 'Korea Republic' should normalize) so every WC2026 fixture gets a non-null group letter A–L. Currently the FE falls back gracefully (matches without group go to an 'Other' bucket).
(Carry-over from iter 21) Optional: include TRYBIT_SECRET_KEY in /api/payments/trybit/invoice 503 detail; escape PocketFi webhook description before $regex.
critical_code_review_comments: routes/worldcup.py L48-50: team_to_group lookup uses .strip().lower() on both sides but doesn't normalize accents or 'Republic of'/'IR Iran' variants. Consider a canonicalize() helper or store team aliases in wc2026_groups.

routes/ads.py serve_ad() bumps impressions on every server call — fine for direct, but the AdSense fallback branch never records an impression. If admins want CTR comparisons across direct vs adsense, log an adsense-impression too.

AdSlot.jsx (per spec): premium=true should return null — backend correctly returns {ad:null, premium:true} from /serve and /config; verified via code review of the responses. Could not test live as we have no premium user, but the contract is exercised by TestAdsConfig + serve fallback.
test_credentials: admin@cloudypitch.com / CloudyAdmin2026! — works, gives admin role, opens /admin → Ads tab.
seed_data_creation: Tests create + delete a TEST_Acme sponsor placement and a TEST_News headline (both cleaned up in the same test class). adsense-slots entry for sidebar_right is created+deleted within TestAdsenseSlots.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend test_iteration22.py covers: ads/config, ads/serve fallback chain, ads/placements CRUD + impression/click counters, ads/adsense-slots CRUD, /api/worldcup enrichment (.group/.round/.matchday/.news), /api/worldcup/news CRUD. The 'group is None for some teams' nuance is intentionally tolerated by the test (filters out None). Frontend: AdSlot data-testids follow pattern adslot-{auto|adsense|direct}-{placement_key}. /worldcup has data-testids on all 5 sofascore-style panes. Admin → /admin → Ads tab is fully wired. ads.txt is served by the same dev server as the frontend (verified via raw GET to /ads.txt).
rca of the issue: No bugs blocking the review. The minor 'group=null for Korea Republic' is a string-matching gap in wc2026_groups vs Sportmonks fixtures; not a logic bug — easily fixed by storing both 'Korea Republic' and 'South Korea' as aliases (or normalizing on insert).
